name: CPU-Path-Tracer
description: A simple path tracer that uses the CPU to render 3D scenes

name: Browser-Dashboard
description: Dashboard-type New Tab Page extension, which displays the latest releases on Einthusan, a movie-streaming service, as well as recent emails under a certain tag.

name: WebGPU-Renderer
description: Website built for playing around with WebGPU features. Contains a 3D triangle-mesh terrain generator, somewhat realistic grass animation with an LOD implementation and more.

name: File-Server
description: A simple file-sharing server which allows users to store files on a server, and give certain users access to it. Only works with files that only contain ASCII characters currently.

name: PPM-Viewer
description: A webpage that allows users to view PPM files from their devices.

name: Huffman-Compression
description: A binary implementation of the Huffman Tree Encoding algorithm, as a data stream.

name: Code-Editor
description: An online page which should allow you to edit code, and should be able to display more types of files and such in the future; based off of VSCode
